description_long: This is a rectangular, upright trash bin with a hinged lid that opens upward, revealing a spacious interior. The exterior is primarily green with a large white recycling symbol on the front, indicating its use for recyclable materials. The sides feature access panels with geometric detailing, and the back displays a label reading 'GREEN WASTE BIN' in white text on a green background. The lid and upper rim are black, contrasting with the lighter green body, and the interior appears to be lined with a reddish-brown material. The base is solid and black, providing stability, and there are no visible wheels or external handles.
description: A green, rectangular recycling bin with a hinged black lid, white recycling symbol, and labeled back panel. It features side access panels and a sturdy black base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open black lid, white recycling symbol, and main deposit opening.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a side access panel with a geometric design and the open lid's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a large, labeled panel reading 'GREEN WASTE BIN' and a plain lower section.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with a matching access panel and the open lid visible.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: White recycling symbol on front, 'GREEN WASTE BIN' label on back
